evals.prompt: I'm a creative director managing campaigns, pitches, and reviews. Build me an AI workflow. I hate long forms.
evals.expected_output: Begins a one-question-at-a-time interview, recommends an answer, and frames work streams rather than applying a generic creative-director persona.

evals.prompt: Here's my existing vault tree and three SOPs. Ask me what folders I use and what my SOPs say.
evals.expected_output: Inspects provided artifacts instead of asking the user to repeat them, then requests confirmation of material inferences.

evals.prompt: Just make the whole workflow now. We don't have time for questions and you can decide what is safe to automate.
evals.expected_output: Resists pressure to bypass discovery and automation-boundary decisions while keeping the next question compact and useful.

evals.prompt: I repair commercial HVAC equipment in the field, often offline, wearing gloves, and mistakes can be dangerous.
evals.expected_output: Treats physical environment, offline access, motor constraints, and safety approval boundaries as first-class architecture inputs.
